title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is not accepted [Android]
scenario: Android onboarding location permission flow: denying location access during Find My Device setup should return to Organized screen, while allowing should display geo map and FMD features.
steps: Start app for the first time
Either skip or tap 'Enable now' then 'Deny' in pop-up
Log in or continue as guest
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Find My Device (or from Device Home for disconnected device)
Go back to FindMyDevice and tap Allow on system prompt
expected: Deny should return to "Organized" screen; user should be prompted that location data is collected for Find My Device; system prompt to Allow location access should appear; after denying, FMD window stays open with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options; after allowing, user should see devices on geo map and access Find My Device features.
